game.name: Ace Zero Game
game.notes: Standalone GitHub Pages game surface. Game engines live under games/ and are routed by registry/games.json.

tutorial.name: Ace Zero Tutorial
tutorial.notes: Standalone tutorial launcher. Currently routes Texas Hold'em tutorial courses into app=game.

dashboard.name: Ace Zero Dashboard
dashboard.notes: GitHub Pages dashboard app used by the ST bridge dashboard loader.

act-result.name: Ace Zero ACT Result
act-result.notes: GitHub Pages ACT result card app used by ST wrapper payloads.
